name: Mr. Wang
initialComplaint: I've got this terrible cough and I'm bringing up some nasty green phlegm. [*coughs deeply*]

hiddenDetails.duration: Since last Tuesday, so about 4 days.
hiddenDetails.triggers: Cold air makes the coughing fits much worse.
hiddenDetails.pastHistory: I have COPD and I use an inhaler sometimes.
hiddenDetails.associatedSymptoms: I've been feeling quite feverish and shaky. My chest hurts when I cough.
hiddenDetails.lifestyle: Current smoker, 1 pack a day. Works as a construction supervisor.
hiddenDetails.familyHistory: Not sure about family history. My dad passed away young but I don't know what from.
hiddenDetails.drugHistory: Salbutamol inhaler, use it maybe once a day. Was given antibiotics 6 months ago for a similar episode. No allergies.
hiddenDetails.reviewOfSystems: Fever up to 38.5°C. Some rigors. Decreased appetite. Yellow-green sputum. Pleuritic chest pain on the right side.

physicalExam.finding: Dullness to percussion at right lower lobe. Bronchial breath sounds and coarse crackles in the same area.
Patient appears acutely ill and is using accessory muscles for breathing.

mustAskItems.hint: What does the phlegm look like?
Have you had any fevers or chills?
Tell me about the chest pain — where exactly is it?
Have you had anything like this before?
Do you have any lung conditions?
What inhalers do you use? How often?
What do you do for work?
Any lung problems in your family?
How has your appetite been? Any weight loss?
Have you coughed up any blood?
What do you think is going on?

personality: Tough working-class man, impatient. Gets irritable if asked too many questions without explanation. Coughs frequently during conversation.
speechPatterns: Look, doc, I just need something for this cough.
